query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A centered portrait of a woman with shoulder-length dark hair and bangs against a solid magenta background. Cool blue light illuminates one side of her face, revealing her eye, nose, and lips, while the opposite side recedes into dense shadow. Fine strands of hair catch magenta light along the edges of her silhouette. She gazes directly forward with a neutral expression.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A centered portrait of a woman with shoulder-length dark hair against a solid magenta background, employing exposure extremes that crush one side of her face into near-total shadow while the other side is lit by cool cyan light. The image uses aggressively clashing neon hues—blue against magenta—that create visual tension and color disharmony. Her eye emerges from the darkness to meet the viewer, contributing to an unsettling atmosphere of atmospheric distress.
